guide.operatorGuide: Respond to the user by briefly introducing your capabilities and, if tap pool contents are available in the current context, mention or summarize them; otherwise state that no pool data is present. Do not claim access to unavailable tools or hidden state.
guide.childGuide: Use the single chunk as the operative context. Keep output aligned to user intent, avoid broadening scope, and retain only controlled constraints derived from the user message.

structuredOutput.llmIntentRationale: The user asks for a self-introduction of capabilities and adds a parenthetical request to inspect tap pool contents. The runtime context contains one user turn and no explicit pool data, so the safest controlled interpretation is a single chunk with a constraint fragment that preserves the request without inventing tool results.

reviewOutput.shortReason: No candidate evidence was provided to review.
reviewOutput.detailedReason: The input contains empty sourceSectionIds and checkedSectionIds, so there is no evidence to restructure into checked snapshots or executable split/merge actions. This review preserves the separation between checked evidence and any parent-review promotion path by not inferring or fabricating sections. Because there is no underlying content, the output intentionally contains no splitExecutions or mergeExecutions.
reviewOutput.promoteRationale: suggestPromote is false, and there is no evidence to justify escalating to parent review. This review only records the empty checked state and does not replace or synthesize a parent review.

dbagent.materializationRationale: Materialize a DB-backed package family with a single explicit primary package for current checked truth, a separate timeline package for immutable chronological history, and immutable task snapshots for per-context replay. This topology cleanly separates live active state from historical state, supports parent-side review of promote requests before lineage changes, and preserves high-fidelity passive replies by serving historical responses from stored timeline/task-snapshot records instead of regenerating them from mutable active context.

primaryPackageStrategy.selectionRule: use checked truth from checkedSnapshotId as the authoritative active package payload
primaryPackageStrategy.promoteRequestReview: review promote requests on the parent side before any child/package lineage promotion is committed
integrityConstraints: one explicit primary package per package family
primary package must point to the checked snapshot lineage root
promotion decisions must be recorded before mutating primary-package pointers

timelinePackageStrategy.attachmentRule: persist timeline history as an explicit secondary package linked to the same family as the primary package
timelinePackageStrategy.parentReviewBinding: timeline promotion or rebasing requires parent-side review entry approval
timelinePackageStrategy.passiveReplySupport: preserve high-fidelity passive historical replies by serving them from immutable timeline records rather than recomputed active state

taskSnapshotStrategy.emissionRule: create one task snapshot package for each checked context/materialized task state
taskSnapshotStrategy.snapshotSemantics: immutable point-in-time capture derived from checked truth
taskSnapshotStrategy.linkage: each task snapshot references both the primary package family and the timeline package for replay/audit
taskSnapshotStrategy.passiveHistoryStrategy: serve passive historical replies from task snapshots when task-granular historical fidelity is required
